name: Old South Pearl Street Association - Farmers Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October, November

Products.value: Fresh Colorado produce, baked goods/pastries, craft coffee, cut flowers, and prepared/chef-made foods from 170+ local vendors; all products must be grown, raised, produced or gathered in Colorado or in bordering counties

Address.value: 1400 + 1500 blocks of South Pearl Street (between Iowa and Arkansas), Denver, CO 80210

notes: The on-file website oldsouthpearlstreet.com is a dead/parked default WordPress install with no content - not usable. The real official site is southpearlstreet.com (run by the Old South Pearl Street merchant association; market itself is managed by Jarman and Co Events), specifically the /farmers-market/ page. On-file Facebook (facebook.com/SouthPearlStreet) was confirmed correct/official via the same site's social links. No phone number, SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, or certified-organic statements were found anywhere on the official site (checked farmers-market and contact pages) or on the linked Facebook/Instagram, so those fields are omitted. Market runs every Sunday, May 3 - November 8, 2026, 9am-1pm, at 1400-1500 South Pearl St, Denver, CO 80210 (rain/snow/shine, closed only in extreme weather; no pets except task-trained service animals).
